stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll rally-killer GIDP · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll grounds into a double play, second baseman Donovan Walton to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Jeff McNeil. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. Corbin Carroll out at 1st.
